name: grapploct
flavor_texts: A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful.
Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea.
text: Grapploct is the Jujitsu Pokémon. It is a fighting-type Pokémon. Abilities: limber, technician (hidden). Base stats — HP: 80, Attack: 118, Defense: 90, Sp. Atk: 70, Sp. Def: 80, Speed: 42. Evolution line: clobbopus → grapploct. Lore: A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful. Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea.
